name: CLIENT-NAME-stores
description: Shopify Theme — eComplete base with client overlay

scripts.push: npm run merge && shopify theme push --path dist
scripts.push:theme: npm run merge && shopify theme push --path dist --theme
scripts.build: npm run build:base && npm run merge
scripts.update:base: cd base && git pull origin main && cd .. && npm run build:base && npm run merge
